classes.description: Child of .s-topbar. Applied to an anchor tag for bypassing the top-level navigation links and jump to the main content on a page. See WCAG Technique G1
Child of .s-topbar. Add atomic classes here to customize internal content width; defaults to `.wmx12`
Child of .s-topbar--container. The logo. Can apply .is-selected to this
Child of .s-topbar--container. Hamburger menu icon. Add .is-selected to turn it into an X
Child of .s-topbar--container. Apply to nav to ensure proper layout.
Child of .s-topbar--navigation. Contains li > .s-topbar--item elements that don’t look like anything in particular
Child of .s-topbar--content > li. A topbar item element with hover, active and focused styling. Can add `.is-selected`
This class excludes the .s-topbar--item from any automatic styling. This is useful for calls to action, e.g. buttons or log in links.
Child of .s-topbar--container. A badge-styled notice that stands out. Add .is-unread to make it stand out more.
Child of .s-topbar--container. Contains a search input and an optional `.s-select`. Hides itself on mobile.
Child of .s-topbar--searchbar. Holds the search input + icon.
On mobile, this class shows the search input below the topbar. Toggle this class with a button.
